compliance.assurance_rationale: FedRAMP Rev.5 Baselines SI-4 System monitoring — unauthorized cloud API call detection is expected CloudTrail-based evidence for SI-4.
FedRAMP Rev.5 Baselines AU-6 Audit review, analysis and reporting — the UC implements the audit-review automation expected for cloud control-plane logs.
SAMA CSF v1.0 3.3.5 Security monitoring — cloud API abuse detection is a core Saudi FI security-monitoring input.
